description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a striking black and white exterior. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling windows, a single-car garage, and a minimalist entryway flanked by tall, slender trees. The house has a geometric, boxy structure with clean lines and extensive use of glass, allowing for abundant natural light. The rear and side elevations continue the modern aesthetic with horizontal siding and more large windows, some arranged in vertical strips. The landscaping is simple, with manicured grass and a paved driveway leading to the garage and main entrance. The overall design emphasizes openness, transparency, and a sleek, contemporary look.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a minimalist black and white exterior. Features include a single-car garage, geometric lines, and simple landscaping with tall trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, single-car garage, tall vertical windows, and a row of slender trees along the driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive glass facade, upper and lower floor windows, and the continuation of the driveway and landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying horizontal siding, a mix of large and vertical strip windows, and a more private, enclosed appearance.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side of the front, emphasizing the row of trees, driveway, and the house's boxy, modern form.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows and vertical strips, asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, glass door, and flanked by tall, narrow trees; no porch or decorative columns.
